label: revdiff current file
command: rm -f /tmp/revdiff-out.txt; revdiff --only="$ZED_FILE" --output=/tmp/revdiff-out.txt; test -f /tmp/revdiff-out.txt; and pbcopy < /tmp/revdiff-out.txt; true

label: revdiff vs master
command: rm -f /tmp/revdiff-out.txt; set MAIN (git symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's|refs/remotes/origin/||'; or echo master); revdiff "$MAIN" --output=/tmp/revdiff-out.txt; test -f /tmp/revdiff-out.txt; and pbcopy < /tmp/revdiff-out.txt; true

label: revdiff uncommitted
command: rm -f /tmp/revdiff-out.txt; revdiff --output=/tmp/revdiff-out.txt; test -f /tmp/revdiff-out.txt; and pbcopy < /tmp/revdiff-out.txt; true
